string.text: A very complex, integrated alteration of the weapon's magazine, mechanical and automated parts, which allows its calibre to be changed at the cost of reliability and magazine size.

A modification made to assault weapon optics through changes to the sight objective lens, improving light capture efficiency. Useful for target acquisition in poorly lit interiors and nighttime environments with limited ambient light, though ineffective in complete darkness.
A set of upgraded components that increases magazine capacity by modifying the magazine disc and adjusting spring tension, allowing more shells to be loaded.
